summary: Tested Admin Dashboard redesign with KPI cards, tabbed chart, recent orders, and inventory stats. All features working correctly. Backend APIs (analytics/overview, revenue-chart, orders, products, categories) all returning expected data. Frontend dashboard renders properly on desktop and mobile.

issues: Console warning: Recharts chart dimension warnings appear during initial render. This is a known Recharts issue when ResponsiveContainer renders before parent has determined dimensions. Does not affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard properly uses data-testid attributes for all major elements, enabling robust testing
KPI cards display correct data from /api/analytics/overview endpoint
Chart tabs (Sales/Orders/Views) switch correctly using Shadcn Tabs component
Recent Orders section displays customer name, amount, and status badge correctly
Mobile responsive design works well - KPI cards show in 2-column grid, period summary in 3-column
Monthly Sales card correctly displays month-over-month percentage change badge
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard redesign fully tested and working. All dashboard elements verified: greeting, KPI cards (Today's Orders/Sales/Visitors, Monthly Sales), Period Summary (This Week/Month/All Time), Tabbed Chart (Sales/Orders/Views), Recent Orders section, Bottom Stats (Products/Categories/Visitors/Conversion), Quick Actions (Add Product/View Orders/View Store). Mobile responsive design confirmed working.

dashboard_greeting.details: Displays 'Hi, GameShop Nepal' with subtitle 'Here's what's happening with your store'

kpi_today_sales.details: Shows today's revenue in formatted currency (Rs)

kpi_today_visitors.details: Shows today's visitor count from visits tracking

kpi_monthly_sales.details: Shows monthly revenue with month-over-month percentage change badge (e.g., -59%)

period_summary_week.details: Shows This Week orders count and revenue with percentage change

period_summary_month.details: Shows This Month orders count and revenue

period_summary_total.details: Shows All Time orders count and revenue

tabbed_chart_sales.details: AreaChart with amber gradient displaying 7-day revenue data

tabbed_chart_orders.details: BarChart with blue bars displaying 7-day order counts

tabbed_chart_views.details: AreaChart with purple gradient displaying 7-day visitor data

tab_switching.details: Tabs switch correctly between Sales/Orders/Views views

recent_orders_section.details: Displays latest 5 orders with customer name, order number, amount (Rs), and status badge

recent_orders_status_badges.details: Status badges (Confirmed, Pending, etc.) display with appropriate colors

bottom_stats_products.details: Shows product count with clickable link to products page

bottom_stats_categories.details: Shows category count with clickable link to categories page

quick_action_view_store.details: Opens store frontend in new tab (target=_blank)

pending_orders_alert.details: Alert shows when pending orders exist (conditional display working)

mobile_responsive.details: Dashboard renders correctly on mobile (390x844): KPI cards in 2-col grid, charts render, all elements visible

test_classes: TestAnalyticsOverview (3 tests) - Overview endpoint structure and auth
TestRevenueChart (3 tests) - Chart data endpoint with 7/30 day options

api_endpoints_verified: GET /api/analytics/revenue-chart?days=7 - Daily chart data with orders/revenue/visits
